subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and that the Point of the Bayán is His servant and His Glory, and this is what hath been sent down from His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و ان نقطه البیان عبده و بهائه و هذا ما نزل من لدی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
